texto: For Dickinson as part of a middle-class community anxious about female creativity, self-assertion, self-expression, and egoism, Shakespeare and Stratford may have been emblems appropriate to her own task as a writer: to achieve literary renown but also authorial disappearance.
explicacao: Citação de Paraic Finnerty sobre temas ligados a sucesso. “For Dickinson as part of a middle-class community anxious about female creativity, self-assertion…” articula sucesso, emily-dickinson, shakespeare em registro de sucesso, com relevância para contextos como shakespeare.
